title: OfferLink Field Mapping Shadowing Bug Pattern
summary: Documents a critical bug pattern in OfferLink's FormFiller where server-side cached fieldMappings shadow correct local field maps. When server mappings match a label but point to non-existent resume fields, the field is skipped because no value existence check was performed (unlike local maps). Fix: add getResumeValue() check to server mapping matches. Also covers the debugging methodology: add console.log to fillAllFields, check resumeField path, verify whether server fieldMappings are interfering. Related to the nativePlace→birthOrigin shadowing fix.

references.description: matchResumeField() with server and local mapping layers
